ns0:entry.ns0:title: IntersectMBO/cardano-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IntersectMBO/cardano-cli
Language: haskell
This repository contains sources for the command-line interface (CLI) tool for interacting with the Cardano blockchain.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IntersectMBO/cardano-ledger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IntersectMBO/cardano-ledger
Language: haskell
The ledger implementation and specifications of the Cardano blockchain.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IntersectMBO/lsm-tree
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IntersectMBO/lsm-tree
Language: haskell
A Haskell library for on-disk tables based on LSM-Trees

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IntersectMBO/ouroboros-network
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IntersectMBO/ouroboros-network
Language: haskell
Specifications of network protocols and implementations of components running these protocols which support a family of Ouroboros Consesus protocols; the diffusion layer of the Cardano Node.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IntersectMBO/plutus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IntersectMBO/plutus
Language: haskell
The Plutus language implementation and tools

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PostgREST/postgrest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PostgREST/postgrest
Language: haskell
REST API for any Postgres database

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agda/agda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agda/agda
Language: haskell
Agda is a dependently typed programming language / interactive theorem prover.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cardano-foundation/cardano-wallet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cardano-foundation/cardano-wallet
Language: haskell
HTTP server & command-line for managing UTxOs and HD wallets in Cardano.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: digital-asset/daml
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/digital-asset/daml
Language: haskell
The Daml smart contract language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: digitallyinduced/ihp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/digitallyinduced/ihp
Language: haskell
🔥 The fastest way to build type safe web apps. IHP is a new batteries-included web framework optimized for longterm productivity and programmer happiness

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fossas/fossa-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fossas/fossa-cli
Language: haskell
Fast, portable and reliable dependency analysis for any codebase. Supports license & vulnerability scanning for large monoliths. Language-agnostic; integrates with 20+ build systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hadolint/hadolint
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hadolint/hadolint
Language: haskell
Dockerfile linter, validate inline bash, written in Haskell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: haskell/cabal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/haskell/cabal
Language: haskell
Official upstream development repository for Cabal and cabal-install

ns0:entry.ns0:title: haskell/ghcup-metadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/haskell/ghcup-metadata
Language: haskell
GHCup metadata repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: haskell/haskell-language-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/haskell/haskell-language-server
Language: haskell
Official Haskell IDE support via the language server protocol (LSP)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koalaman/shellcheck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck
Language: haskell
ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

ns0:entry.ns0:title: monoscope-tech/monoscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/monoscope-tech/monoscope
Language: haskell
Monoscope lets you ingest and explore your logs, traces and metrics. We store these in S3 compatible buckets. Query in natural language via LLMs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nammayatri/nammayatri
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nammayatri/nammayatri
Language: haskell
A Direct-to-Driver open mobility platform powering the next-generation of mobility applications in India.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: runtimeverification/haskell-backend
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/runtimeverification/haskell-backend
Language: haskell
The symbolic execution engine powering the K Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simplex-chat/simplex-chat
Language: haskell
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: simplex-chat/simplexmq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/simplex-chat/simplexmq
Language: haskell
⚙️ SimpleXMQ - A reference implementation of the SimpleX Messaging Protocol for simplex queues over public networks.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/swarm-game/swarm
Language: haskell
Resource gathering + programming game

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unisonweb/unison
Language: haskell
A friendly programming language from the future

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: haskell
